text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Eeny, meeny, miny, moe! ♪ I don't<n>care if it's
rain or snow, help me<n>choose where I should go!
choice_data_list: That's a cute rhyme you got going there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I guess it's no use tryingto hide that I was singing... You see, Ihave today off, so I was thinkingabout what to do.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But the more I thought about it, the<n>more things
started popping into my<n>head!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm tempted to go out to eat<n>something yummy,
but maybe I should<n>do some running instead...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Back in Hokkaido, the only place I<n>could really go
on my days off was<n>the nearby farm, so I'm not
used to<n>having so many choices. Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What do you think I should do?
choice_data_list: You should treat yourself to something tasty.
You should treat yourself to something tasty.
Go everywhere that pops into your head!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What do you think I should do?
choice_data_list: You should treat yourself to something tasty.
You should treat yourself to something tasty.
Go everywhere that pops into your head!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're totally right! All righty, I'm<n>gonna head
into town and eat a whole<n>bunch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the suggestion! Ehehe.<n>What should I
start with?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hamburger steak, or ramen... Eeny,<n>meeny, miny,
moe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooh, that's an option too! I guessliving in the city means I can goall-out and do something like that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It took aaages to get from one place<n>to another
back home, you know?<n>Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oops! I can't be all wishy-washy<n>now! Don't
wanna waste my<n>precious time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! I'm gonna head out andvisit all the places! Thanks for theadvice!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And with that, Special Week runs off<n>with glee.
